getDashboard_5168f207e9.description:
Successfully compiled but failed at runtime.

Error Analysis:
*What Failed*: The test `testUserWithNullUserIdThrowsException` expected a NullPointerException but instead received a NumberFormatException.

*Where*: `AppControllerGetDashboardTest.java:257`, in `AppController.getDashboard(AppController.java:45)`

*Why*: A null user ID is being passed and is attempted to be parsed as an integer, throwing NumberFormatException rather than NullPointerException.

*Investigate*: Update the test to expect NumberFormatException, or improve `getDashboard` to explicitly handle null user IDs before parsing. Consider input validation and clearer error handling.,

user is an instance variable and inconsistent with session “user”

All dependencies (accountRepository & session) behave as expected in a multi-threaded context

getPaymentHistory_7e55128f09.description:
Successfully compiled but failed at runtime.

Error Analysis:
*What Failed:*  
Test parsing of a userId with surrounding whitespace failed due to a NumberFormatException.

*Where:*  
AppController.getPaymentHistory (AppController.java:67), triggered by AppControllerGetPaymentHistoryTest.testUserIdWithWhitespaceParsedCorrectly (line 400).

*Why:*  
Input string " 42 " (with leading/trailing spaces) was passed directly to Integer.parseInt, causing a NumberFormatException.

*Investigate:*  
Update getPaymentHistory() to trim input strings before parsing; review input sanitization wherever user IDs are parsed. Add test cases for similar input variations.,

getTransactiontHistory_29b1ff7483.description:
Successfully compiled but failed at runtime.

Error Analysis:
What Failed: The test expected a NullPointerException but a NumberFormatException was thrown instead.
Where: AppControllerGetTransactiontHistoryTest.testUserIdIsNull (line 307); actual error at AppController.getTransactiontHistory (line 85).
Why: Passing a null userId causes Integer.parseInt(null), triggering NumberFormatException instead of NullPointerException.
Investigate: Update input handling in getTransactiontHistory; adjust the test to expect NumberFormatException or add null checks prior to parsing.,

getAccountTransactiontHistory_8ce4880a24.description:
Successfully compiled but failed at runtime.

Error Analysis:
* What Failed: Test for missing AccountId in request expected NullPointerException, instead got NumberFormatException.
* Where: AppControllerGetAccountTransactiontHistoryTest.testMissingAccountIdInRequestMapThrowsException (line 87).
* Why: AppController.getAccountTransactiontHistory() attempts to parse a null AccountId as Integer, throwing NumberFormatException instead of NullPointerException.
* Investigate: Update test to expect NumberFormatException, or fix controller logic to handle missing AccountId null-safely and throw the expected exception. Review input validation for AccountId in getAccountTransactiontHistory().,
